## Checklist

- [ ] `dev` builds and passes all checks locally (no CI/CD wired up yet — verify manually)
- [ ] Release notes / changelog drafted
- [ ] No unmerged work-in-progress feature branches are silently included
- [ ] Non-negotiable principles ([design doc §2](../../docs/design-doc.md#2-design-principles-non-negotiable)) still hold across everything being released
- [ ] Version bump follows semver relative to the last release
- [ ] This PR uses **merge commit**, not squash, when merged
